english translation text: Shaheed Hogaye AsgharHazrat Ali Asghar (a.s) has been martyredEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Shaheed hogaye Asghar ujer gaya julaAjal ne kar diya khaali bhara huwa jula
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Hazrat Ali Asghar (a.s.) has been martyred, his cradle is now empty,
Destiny has emptied the cradle that was once occupied

urdu transliteration text:
Koi to kaash ye kehta na zaalimo luto,Ke ek dukhe huwe dilka hay aasra jula
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
If only someone would have told the oppressors not to loot,
This cradle gives solace to a broken heart

urdu transliteration text:
Thay maake haath rasanme bandhay palay AsgharJhula rahi thi magar maaki maamta jhoola
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The hands that had looked after Asghar (a.s) are now tied in ropes,
It is a mother’s love that now swings the cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Kahani reh gai Asghar ki khoon rulanekoNa reh gaye Ali Asghar na reh gaya jula
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Now only the story of Asghar (a.s.) remains for tears of blood to be shed,
Neither Asghar (a.s.) remains nor his cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Lahad me aaye thay jhuleko chhor kar AsgharTo zalzalaone lahadko banaadliya jula
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Asghar (a.s.) came to his grave leaving his cradle behind,
Now his grave has become his cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Har aik Shaheed ka laasha tha saamne uskeLiye thay hathome taswire Karbala
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Imam Hussain (a.s) had the body of every martyr in front of him,
But has in his hands the most innocent (Ali Asgher a.s.) of Karbala
